params.SpellDescription: If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent this turn, it deals double that damage to that player instead.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent this turn, it deals double that damage to that player instead.

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, create a number of 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens equal to the number of opponents you have.
